title: Book Passage: Eric Ries with Alex Komoroske
summary: Eric visits Book Passage in Corte Madera, Marin County — one of the Bay Area's landmark independent bookstores — in conversation with Alex Komoroske, CEO and co-founder of Common Tools. The event brings the Incorruptible thesis to Marin's community of founders, investors, and business leaders.
blockquote: A bold and urgently needed rethink of how modern organizations are built — exploring how success can turn companies against their founding principles.
